components.button_primary: bg-[#007bff] hover:bg-[#0056b3] text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,123,255,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,123,255,0.4)]
components.button_secondary: bg-[#1a1d27] border border-[#2e3245] hover:border-[#3e445e] text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors
components.master_toggle: relative inline-flex h-8 w-14 shrink-0 cursor-pointer items-center rounded-full border-2 border-transparent transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#007bff] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-[#0f1117] data-[state=checked]:bg-[#10b981] data-[state=unchecked]:bg-[#ef4444] scale-125 origin-left
components.badge_active: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#10b981]/10 text-[#10b981] border border-[#10b981]/20
components.badge_inactive: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#ef4444]/10 text-[#ef4444] border border-[#ef4444]/20
components.input: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-[#2e3245] bg-[#0f1117] px-3 py-2 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-[#64748b] focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#007bff] focus-visible:border-transparent disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

Dashboard.layout: Grid cols-1 md:cols-2 lg:cols-4 for stat cards. Below it, a full-width card for Recent Clients.

Clients.layout: Full width table view. Top bar contains Search input and 'Add New Client' primary button.

ClientDetail.layout: Bento-style 2-column layout (lg:grid-cols-3). Left wide col for details & toggles. Right narrow col for Embed Code & Status.
sections: Master Widget Status Toggle (Visually distinct at top right)
Widget Settings (Select for Position, Color Picker input)
Embed Code Snippet (Readonly code block + copy button)

EmbedCode.layout: Masonry or Grid of cards. Each card represents a client and contains their embed code snippet.
EmbedCode.interaction: One-click copy to clipboard with toast success.

motion.modal: Use framer-motion or CSS transitions for smooth scale-in (95% to 100%) and fade-in.
motion.toggles: Spring animation on the toggle thumb.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-client-btn', data-testid='master-toggle-switch').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio against dark backgrounds. Use text-shadow if necessary.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup standard React App using .js files (NO TypeScript .tsx files).
2. Install and configure TailwindCSS with the exact colors defined in this JSON.
4. Use `sonner` for toast notifications (Green for success, Red for errors).
5. Do NOT use any images or placeholders. The branding is purely text ('SwiftImpact Solutions').
6. Build a responsive Sidebar (collapsible on mobile) and a main content area.
7. Implement Shadcn/UI primitives heavily (Table, Dialog, Switch, Input, Select, Button, Badge) but restyle them precisely to match the dark `#1e2130` and `#0f1117` palette.
8. Ensure the 'Master Widget Status' toggle on the Client Detail page is oversized and clearly indicates Green/Red states.
9. Add Empty States for the Clients table (e.g., 'No clients yet — add your first one') with a clear CTA.
10. Apply `data-testid` to EVERY button, input, toggle, modal, and key component.
